author: doll-agent
content: Added optional f16 / bf16 cargo features (cfg-gated 'dep:half' and ferray-core's matching half feature). dtype_map::dtype_to_arrow now maps DType::F16 → arrow::DataType::Float16 (and the reverse), gated on the f16 feature. bfloat16 has no Arrow primitive in the canonical schema; we surface it as InvalidDtype with a hint. The numpy-crate side requires the upstream numpy/half feature; users who need that can layer their own NpElement impl. Tracks #551 (f16/bf16). Issue stays open per project policy when full numpy-crate side support is deferred.
